title: The Crew Faces the Heat
description: On pages 12–13, this part focuses on the crew faces the heat, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The Crew Faces the Heat. The Straw Hats struggle across Alabasta’s harsh desert as Vivi’s urgency and the scale of the rebellion become clearer. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: To think they'd go so far against a poor animal...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Yeah, you really gotta sympathize with the poor beast when it's up against those 3...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Hey Sanji, we can eat this, right!?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Yeah, looks like it.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Great! Perfect time for a lunch too!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Whoa, look!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: The rocks out here are a mature's frying pans!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: So... What's up with this camel?

dialogue.speaker: Toto
dialogue.text: I dunno. I was busy chasing those birds earlier but they flew away,

dialogue.speaker: Toto
dialogue.text: The first time I was in the

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: And before I knew it, there was this big lizard in front of me chasing after this camel. That's about when I started running back here.

dialogue.speaker: Baroque Works agent
dialogue.text: It doesn't look like a wild camel,

dialogue.speaker: Baroque Works agent
dialogue.text: Especially since there's already a saddle on it and all.

dialogue.speaker: Baroque Works agent
dialogue.text: Hey, that means we can ride it!

dialogue.speaker: Baroque Works agent
dialogue.text: Oh, that'll be useful. It looks like up to 2 people can ride on it.

dialogue.speaker: Baroque Works agent
dialogue.text: Nothing beats a camel when walking across the desert!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Alright, then I'll just...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Agh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What's up with this camel?

dialogue.speaker: Baroque Works agent
dialogue.text: "I'm a harmless camel passing-by. I must thank you for saving my life back there just now."

dialogue.speaker: Baroque Works agent
dialogue.text: "Now, although I can give you humans a ride..."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: "I'm not the type to give males a ride."...Is what he just said.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Who the hell do you think just saved your worthless ass back there!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Oh, I'm sorry that these bandits are treating you so badly.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: There, there. You're a good boy, aren't you?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Now what should I call you?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Idiot.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Pumbass.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Octopus.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: How about, "Eyelashes?"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I think that was the weirdest name sug- gested yet.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Vivi, get on!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: No, I'm fine. I can still walk some more.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Perverted camel,

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Oh, just get on.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Perverted camel.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: We should be able to reach Yuba a little sooner now that we have a camel.

summary: This part develops the crew faces the heat and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
